## Describe the bug
A clear description of what is going wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Logs
Paste relevant lines from `logs/newsbrewer_YYYY-MM-DD.log` or GitHub Actions logs.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- NewsBrewer version / commit hash:
- Email provider: [e.g. Gmail, Outlook]

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
